title: Demo Post 1: Exploring the CMS
content:
This is the content for demo post number 1. This lightweight CMS makes blogging easy and fast.

Why use flat files?

  • No database setup required
  • Fast performance
  • Easy to backup and migrate

Enjoy building your site!
